name: install.sh
description: Installs git hooks by routing this worktree to .githooks via worktree-local core.hooksPath

name: pre-commit
description: Pre-commit hook — hard gates only (syntax, security, safety). All soft checks run in GitHub Actions PR workflows.

name: pre-commit-no-deletions
description: Variant pre-commit hook that blocks file deletions (safety net for content preservation)

name: pre-push
description: Pre-push hook — blocks push if AI stash files present, codex locks stale, or task contract invalid

name: server-manager.js
description: Manages Mintlify dev server lifecycle for browser tests (start/stop/health-check)
pipeline: manual — legacy browser-validation module imported by .githooks/verify-browser.js

name: verify-browser.js
description: Verifies browser availability for Puppeteer-based integration tests

name: verify.sh
description: Pre-commit sub-hook — verifies file-walker is available and runs structural checks on staged files

name: audit-component-usage.js
description: Component usage auditor — scans pages for component usage patterns and reports statistics

name: scan-component-imports.js
description: Scans MDX imports to produce component-usage-map.json and detect @usedIn drift.

name: page-imports-audit.js
description: Canonical page import audit — validates page-reachable MDX, JS, JSX, TS, TSX, and JSON imports and forbids React runtime imports on Mintlify page surfaces.
scope: operations/scripts, operations/reports/health/page-imports, v2 page import graph

name: page-links-audit.js
description: Canonical page-link audit — validates internal page refs, anchors, JSX link props, and optional external URL health for v2 page surfaces.
scope: operations/scripts, operations/reports/health/page-links, v2 docs page surfaces

name: audit-copy-patterns.js
description: Aggregate copy pattern violations across a tab or full v2 tree and emit a diagnostic report.

name: audit-media-assets.js
description: Audits repo media assets, references, ignore leakage, and externalized asset branch inventory.
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: audit-python.py
description: Python page audit utility — validates routed docs files, snippet imports, and internal links, then writes page-audit reports

name: audit-v2-usefulness.js
description: Usefulness auditor — scores v2 MDX pages on human and agent usefulness with source-weighted 2026 accuracy verification
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: docs-quality-and-freshness-audit.js
description: Content freshness audit — checks for TODO/TBD/Coming Soon markers, thin pages, stale content

name: generate-content-gap-reconciliation.js
description: Content-gap reconciliation generator — compares blueprint coverage against v2 MDX and writes reconciliation artefacts

name: audit-glossary-gaps.js
description: Glossary gap auditor — scans v2 MDX pages for terminology candidates not

name: audit-icon-usage.js
description: Icon usage auditor — scans v2 and docs-guide MDX pages for icon prop

name: terminology-search.js
description: Terminology search — searches glossary/terminology data for definitions

name: style-and-language-homogenizer-en-gb.js
description: EN-GB style homogeniser — finds and fixes American English spellings, style guide violations, and formatting inconsistencies across v2 content

name: docs-page-research.js
description: Docs page research runner — extracts factual claims from docs pages, checks evidence sources, detects contradictions across related pages, and emits manual-first research reports.

name: docs-research-adjudication.js
description: Docs research adjudication ledger — validates, records, and summarizes measured review outcomes for the page-content research workflow so trust decisions are based on real usage rather than intuition.

name: audit-tasks-folders.js
description: Tasks folder auditor — checks workspace/ structure, normalises report locations, applies recommendations with conflict-safe moves

name: generate-v2-folder-governance-cleanup-matrix.js
description: V2 folder governance cleanup matrix generator — inventories non-publishable and legacy v2 artifacts and emits human-review markdown/json recommendations before any moves are applied.

name: audit-script-categories.js
description: Script auditor — analyses all repo scripts, categorises usage/overlap, generates SCRIPT_AUDIT reports
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: script-footprint-and-usage-audit.js
description: Script footprint auditor — analyses script file sizes, dependencies, and usage patterns across the repo

name: cross-agent-packager.js
description: Cross-agent packager — bundles audit reports and repo state into agent-consumable packages

name: export-portable-skills.js
description: Portable skills exporter — copies canonical template skills into cross-agent pack folders and validates drift.

name: sync-codex-skills.js
description: Codex skills sync — synchronises skill definition files and managed companion resources between canonical templates and local Codex installs. Supports --check mode.

name: lock-release.js
description: Codex lock release utility — releases stale codex lock files
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: task-cleanup.js
description: Codex task cleanup utility — reports and prunes merged clean worktrees plus stale local codex branches after merge
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: task-preflight.js
description: Codex task preflight — generates task setup files and validates preconditions
pipeline: manual — codex setup tool referenced by .githooks/pre-commit guidance, not auto-executed

name: fetch-external-docs.sh
description: External docs fetcher — pulls doc fragments from external GitHub repos into snippets/composables/pages/shared/ for inclusion in builds

name: fetch-lpt-exchanges.sh
description: LPT exchange data fetcher — pulls exchange listing data for LPT token pages

name: fetch-openapi-specs.sh
description: OpenAPI spec fetcher — pulls latest OpenAPI specs from Livepeer services for reference pages

name: convert-rss-to-mdx.js
description: RSS-to-MDX converter — imports RSS feed items and converts to MDX page format

name: generate-localized-docs-json.js
description: Locale docs.json generator — produces localised docs.json variants from route-map and source docs.json

name: config.js
description: i18n configuration — language codes, locale paths, translation settings

name: docs-json-localizer.js
description: docs.json localiser engine — transforms docs.json navigation for locale variants

name: docs-routes.js
description: docs route resolver — maps page paths to locale-aware routes

name: frontmatter.js
description: Frontmatter parser/writer for translation surfaces.

description: MDX parser for i18n — extracts translatable content blocks from MDX

name: mdx-translate.js
description: MDX translation engine — applies translations to MDX content blocks

name: path-utils.js
description: Path utilities for i18n — locale-aware path resolution and mapping

name: provenance.js

name: provider-mock.js

name: provider-openrouter.js
description: OpenRouter translation provider — calls OpenRouter API for actual translations

name: providers.js
description: Provider registry — selects translation provider (OpenRouter or mock) based on configuration

name: docs-json-localizer.test.js

name: frontmatter.test.js
description: Tests frontmatter parser — validates frontmatter read/write roundtrip

name: mdx-translate.test.js
description: Tests MDX translation — validates content block translation logic

name: provenance.test.js
description: Tests provenance tracker — validates translation provenance recording

name: provider-openrouter.test.js

name: translate-docs.js

name: validate-generated.js

name: studio-docs-migration.js

description: Report publisher — publishes v2 internal audit reports to configured output locations
scope: operations/scripts, tools/config, v2/internal, docs.json, workspace/reports, operations/tests/reports

name: docs-path-sync.js
description: Shared docs path sync library — detects staged page moves, plans deterministic route rewrites, and applies governed docs.json/path reference updates.

name: mdx-sanitise.js
description: Shared sanitisation utilities for all scripts that write content consumed by MDX pages.
pipeline: external content -> sanitise -> safe MDX/JSX output
policy: No external dependencies. Node.js built-ins only. UK English.

name: mintlify-canonical-sync.js
description: Shared Mintlify canonical sync library — loads the Mintlify consumer registry, validates cleanup state, and plans deterministic reference rewrites.

name: og-image-policy.js
description: OG image policy helper — resolves authored MDX pages to canonical section or fallback social images and metadata.

name: check-codex-pr-overlap.js
description: PR enforcer — checks for conflicting codex PRs targeting the same files/branches

name: codex-commit.js
description: Codex commit helper — audits codex branch state and generates compliant commit messages

name: create-codex-pr.js
description: Codex PR creator — generates codex PR with correct branch naming, labels, and body template

name: task-finalise.js
description: Codex task finaliser — enforces task completion requirements before closing
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: run-solutions-social-fetch.js
description: Dispatches all solutions social data fetch scripts in sequence with env from a local .env file.

name: page-integrity-dispatch.js
description: Page integrity dispatcher — resolves page scope once, runs page link and import audits, applies deterministic repairs, reruns, and emits combined unresolved findings plus rolling-issue planning data.

name: page-integrity-rolling-issue.js
description: Rolling issue helper — decides create/update/close behavior for unresolved page-integrity findings and formats issue bodies for workflow automation.

name: docs-page-research-pr-report.js
description: Docs page research PR report — runs the fact-check research runner on changed docs pages and emits an advisory PR artifact summarizing claim families, contradictions, unresolved factual risk, and propagation follow-up.
pipeline: manual — experimental advisory PR integration, non-blocking

name: docs-research-packet.js
description: Docs research packet generator — derives nav, manifest, or explicit path scope; runs the research stack tranche-by-tranche; and writes reusable packet reports plus a master rollup.
pipeline: manual — packet generator for research review tranches

name: orchestrator-guides-research-review.js
description: Orchestrator guides research review packet wrapper — delegates to the generic docs-research-packet engine with the live Orchestrators Guides nav scope and legacy default output root.

name: generate-changelog.js
description: Unified changelog generator for all changelog targets (solutions, contracts, resources).
pipeline: config → GitHub/GitLab REST API → [LLM optional] → [on-chain verify optional] → changelog.mdx
policy: Public repos only. GITHUB_TOKEN optional (rate limits). No secrets in output.

name: project-showcase-sync.js
description: Fetches project showcase data from external source, writes to snippets/data/showcase-feed/

name: fetch-discord-announcements.js
description: Fetches announcements from Discord channels via bot token. Writes per-product
policy: Announcements channel only. No general chat. Requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.

name: fetch-forum-data.js
description: Fetches latest topics and posts from Livepeer Forum API, writes to snippets/data/social-feeds/

description: Fetches Livepeer blog posts via public RSS feed (blog.livepeer.org/rss/). No API key required. Writes to snippets/data/social-feeds/ghostBlogData.jsx.
policy: PUBLIC RSS only. No API keys.

name: fetch-github-discussions.js
description: Fetches latest GitHub Discussions via public GraphQL API, writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: Public repos only. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN for rate limits (optional for public repos).

name: fetch-github-releases.js
description: Fetches latest GitHub Releases via public REST API, writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: Public repos only. No auth needed for public repos. GITHUB_TOKEN optional for rate limits.

name: fetch-rss-blog-data.js
description: Generic RSS blog fetcher. Reads product config, fetches RSS feeds (Ghost, Leaflet, etc.), writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: PUBLIC APIs / RSS only. No API keys for platforms we don't own.

name: rubric-loader.js
description: Loads and parses rubric YAML/JSON for page-type scoring rules.

name: rule-evaluators.js
description: Evaluates individual rubric rules against page content.

name: scoring.js
description: Aggregates rule scores into a final usefulness score per page.

name: docs-authoring-rules.js
description: Shared warning-level authoring rules for guide layouts and code-block metadata, plus deterministic code-block icon repair.

name: docs-index-utils.js
description: Shared utilities for docs-index.json generation — path resolution, frontmatter extraction, index merging

name: docs-page-scope.js
description: Shared authored-page scope helpers that distinguish generated docs pages from authored docs pages for warning-only validators and reports.

name: docs-publishability.js
description: Shared path publishability rules for v2 docs content and tooling.

name: frontmatter-taxonomy.js
description: Shared frontmatter taxonomy utilities for routable docs pages.

name: mdx-safe-markdown.js
description: Shared MDX-safe markdown helpers that collect first-party markdown files, detect unsafe patterns, and apply deterministic repairs.

name: agent-write-governance.js
description: Agent write-governance helpers — load and validate the canonical manifest for admitted agent output classes and destinations.

name: component-governance-utils.js
description: Shared parsing and validation utilities for component governance scripts.

name: generated-artifacts.js
description: Generated artifact governance helpers — load the manifest, validate enums, and match staged files to managed artifacts

name: generated-file-banners.js
description: Generated file banner template — provides standard banner text for auto-generated files

name: repo-governance.js
description: Repo governance helpers — load the canonical registry, validate its schema, and expose derived state for generators and validators.

name: root-governance.js
description: Root governance helpers — load the canonical manifest, validate the governed root contract, and project derived allowlist/report state.

name: script-governance-config.js
description: Shared governance constants for script discovery, indexing, classification, and pipeline normalisation across the repo.

name: script-header-utils.js
description: Shared helpers for extracting and reading top-of-file script governance headers without scanning into executable source.
